'''Pulga''' were a type of creature native to the forest [[moon]] [[Endor]]. The [[Sentience|sentient]] [[Ewok]]s also native to the moon would sometimes ride pulga.<ref name="AEYNTK" />

==Behind the scenes==
The term pulga was first used in the ''[[Star Wars Legends]]'' continuity and was used to refer to a type of [[Horse/Legends|horse]] found on Endor.<ref name="TEGTC">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> Gaupa were confirmed to be [[canon]] by the sourcebook ''[[Star Wars: Absolutely Everything You Need to Know]]'' in [[2015]], which used the term independently from [[Horse|pony]] and so suggested the creatures were a separate group.<ref name="AEYNTK" />
